summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of 7 refinements (animated burger menu, green active buttons, mobile carousel scroll-hints, vertical-scroll bug fix, green footer, green Krakow address card, dropdown time slot generator bound to working hours of selected day). 22/22 assertions PASS. Found and fixed one small i18n omission (PL scrollHint translation was missing from content.js - default language is PL so the carousel hint label would render empty); added 'Przesuń, aby zobaczyć więcej' per spec.

issues: Container clientHeight=266 vs scrollHeight=286 (~20px content overflow). overflow-y:hidden correctly clips so users cannot vertically scroll via touch/wheel — UX bug from request IS fixed. Minor visual nit only: a few mobile offer card texts (e.g. 'Stworzony do rozmów i długich poranków.') get clipped at the bottom because items-stretch can't grow taller than the tallest sibling. Consider increasing min-h on .offer-carousel items or reducing inner padding on <640px.

action_items: (Optional UX polish) Offer mobile carousel: a small amount of card content is visually clipped because card heights are stretched to a fixed row height. Either bump the carousel container min-height for <640px, or reduce internal padding (p-8) on offer cards in the mobile variant.
critical_code_review_comments: content.js PL section was missing the `scrollHint` key while EN/DE had it. Default app language is PL so the mobile scroll-hint rendered with empty text until I patched it. Recommend a small i18n unit test that asserts all language objects share the same top-level keys to catch this class of regression.

Calendar (shadcn rdp) day buttons have no aria-label set, only numeric text content. This is fine for sighted users but reduces accessibility; consider passing `formatters` to react-day-picker to set descriptive aria-labels.

Reservation form's `notes` field maps to data-testid but the form submit always succeeds even with empty notes (correct) — note however that `<input required>` on phone uses type='tel' without pattern validation; non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 refinement requests verified on https://cafe-booking-demo-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Specifically validated: (a) AnimatePresence burger toggle opens/closes mobile-menu at 390px, (b) lang-btn-pl/en/de active uses bg #2F6042 = rgb(47,96,66) and inactives have no green bg, (c) menu-tab-N active = green, (d) Gallery: md:hidden carousel + carousel-scroll-hint visible @390px with text 'Przesuń, aby zobaczyć więcej', desktop bento grid shows on >=768px, (e) Offer: sm:hidden carousel + hint visible @390px, grid on >=640px, (f) Footer bg=rgb(35,75,51) = #234B33, (g) About Krakow card bg=rgb(47,96,66) = #2F6042, (h) Reservation res-time-trigger is BUTTON (Radix Select) not native time input; default (no date) shows 08:00..14:00 in 30-min steps; after picking Saturday June 6, 2026 via calendar (column index 6 = 'Sa'), slots become 07:30..15:30 with no 07:00 and no 16:00 — exactly matching the spec; reservation submit clears fields and logs to console (mocked, intentional). No pageerror, no console errors. Navbar AnimatePresence import regression confirmed fixed.
rca of the issue: Missing PL `scrollHint` key in /app/frontend/src/data/content.js (EN and DE had it, PL did not). Because LanguageContext defaults to PL, the ScrollHint component received `label={undefined}` and rendered an empty <span>. Repro: load app at 390px → scroll to Galeria/Oferta → arrow chevron animation visible but no text. Fix applied: added `scrollHint: 'Przesuń, aby zobaczyć więcej'` to the PL block.
